weaknesses_summary: Reproducibility: 10pp cross-hardware variance (mitigated by same-hardware main comparisons)
Baselines: concise-CoT and extraction prompting not tested (scoped to greedy decoding)
Cross-architecture: DeepSeek GSM8K in progress (strengthens but not blocking)
Benchmark breadth: adequate for controlled mechanism paper
Theory: appropriately scoped, not major independent contribution
